nonBlockingIssues.description: In runAgent error handling paths (tools_coagent.go lines 348, 353, 361), when posting error messages to the channel fails, the error is silently ignored with `_, _ = ch.Post(...)`. While acceptable for error paths, this could theoretically mask issues if the channel itself is in a bad state. Consider logging these failures if logging infrastructure is available.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for handling inherited in-progress work. When a worker is assigned to a feature that already has partial implementation from prior attempts, the TDD procedure should explicitly allow: (1) First verify/understand existing code, (2) Add supplemental tests for new/modified behavior rather than deleting existing implementation to start from scratch, (3) Complete the implementation, (4) Document the deviation in skillFeedback as 'inherited partial implementation'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature peer-coagent-channels: Worker correctly deviated from TDD procedure because feature was partially implemented from prior attempts. Worker noted in handoff.skillFeedback.deviations: 'This worker inherited partially implemented feature files from earlier attempts, so the first task was to verify and finish that work rather than starting from an untouched baseline.' Worker added supplemental tests instead of writing tests first. This is the correct approach for the situation but the go-worker skill doesn't guide workers on when to deviate from TDD.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.rationale: The go-worker skill currently assumes a greenfield TDD workflow. When features fail and are reassigned, workers inherit partial implementations and need explicit guidance on how to handle this situation without violating the skill's TDD principles.

summary: All 5 features in the core-simplification milestone passed scrutiny review. All validators (build, typecheck, test) passed. No blocking issues found. One non-blocking issue identified in error handling. Applied 4 factual documentation updates (AGENTS.md line counts, architecture.md peer agent pattern, spec-check-flow.md state signal).
